mapper.select:
SELECT c.*, u.user_name FROM competition c JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.user_id
deadline > NOW()
AND
(c.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR c.tag1 LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR c.tag2 LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR c.tag3 LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR c.tag4 LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR c.tag5 LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR c.school_requirements LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

select user_id, title, tag1, tag2, tag3, tag4, tag5, competition_details, max_participants, school_requirements, deadline, (select count(*) from competition_member where competition_id = #{competitionId} and admission_status = 1) as currentCount from competition c where competition_id = #{competitionId}
select u.user_id, u.user_name from user u join competition_member cm on u.user_id = cm.user_id where cm.competition_id = #{competitionId} and cm.admission_status = 1
